rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NORRIS ROHDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The procedural issues have not been cleared: (1) Notice of Hearing to all persons who are entitled and the notice to include Notice of Directions for Remote Appearances and Access to be given to the persons entitled to. PC 11000 and LRSF 14.1.D.6. Notice of hearing filed 8/7/2023 shows the notices were sent to the heirs' counsels' emails; however, no allegation if PC 1220(c) has been met (i.e., consents for e-service not on file). (2) Financial statement showing the balance. PC 10900. (3) A separate declaration for extraordinary compensation pursuant to CRC 7.702. Petition seeks the compensation $14,095; however, no relevant facts have been provided. The court will to determine on transferring the net proceeds from the sale of the real property in CA to the personal representative in the sister act without the court's approval. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
